message:
fix(cli): validate extension flags before model selection and fix theme check order

Move extension flag validation to right after resource loading so that
unknown flags produce exit code 2 (usage error) instead of being masked
by unrelated startup failures like "No models available".  Also swap
theme path validation before --version so invalid theme paths always
error regardless of the --version flag.

Fixes e2e_cli_invalid_flag_is_error and e2e_cli_theme_flag_invalid_path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
